narrative: Hot US CPI reignites inflation fears and hawkish Fed expectations, driving the US Dollar Index higher toward 98.30; gold lower -0.15%; equities -0.16%; DXY +0.34%; VIX 18.0. USD/JPY firms to 157.58 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage persists despite rising JGB yields. AUD/JPY emerges as the week's dominant G8 bilateral theme (1.059% spread) as RBA's hiking bias supports AUD +0.553% (n=4) against JPY -0.506% (n=7). Watch RBNZ Inflation Expectations at 03:00 UTC for NZD directional risk.
